result.text: Scan: a sedan with hospital parking tags, driver in scrubs, coffee thermos at {n:20-60} percent. Night-shift energy readings detected. Send silent gratitude, or scan their playlist?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

grat.text: Gratitude beam charged. Standard intensity, or full honors?

full.text: Full honors transmitted: every light we pass for the next mile will feel slightly warmer to them. We can't prove it works. We refuse to stop.

std.text: Gratitude delivered at standard intensity. They'll never know. That's the whole art of it, Captain.

play.text: Playlist: {pick:extremely calm piano|extremely loud metal|a true-crime podcast, ironically}. Whatever gets a healer home safe. Respect logged.
